markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into customer use cases and market dynamics for content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Enterprise customers seek automation, not just productivity.** They want AI to trigger actions and run workflows autonomously, not just assist with manual tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**You.com's core value proposition is de-risking AI adoption.** This is achieved through a secure, data-retention-free platform offering access to all leading LLMs, hedging against the risk of choosing the wrong one.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [**A critical internal product naming issue (E2E vs. AI Factory) is causing market confusion.** This must be resolved to create a unified, clear external message.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=2719.0)
  - [**A major content opportunity exists in educating enterprises on AI transformation.** This includes explaining the required investment and organizational change needed to ensure project success and secure future budgets.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=3677.0)

## Topics

### Customer Use Cases & Needs

  - [**Workforce AI Literacy:**](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
      - [Training employees on prompt engineering for writing, research, and image generation.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
      - [Success depends on personalized training (e.g., You.com's partnership with Pair) with role-specific exercises to drive adoption beyond the 5-7% of early adopters.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [**Data Integration & RAG:**](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
      - [Connecting AI to internal data via APIs (Salesforce, ServiceNow) or vectorized indexing for conversational search.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
      - [**Private RAG:** Effective for unstructured data (PDFs, articles), but not for structured data (rows/columns) requiring API queries.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
      - [**MCP Server (Roadmap):** Aims to solve the challenge of querying highly configurable structured systems (Salesforce, SAP) conversationally.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=1815.0)
  - [**API Embedding:**](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
      - [SaaS companies and developers embedding You.com's APIs (web index, news index) into their own products.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
      - [The RE API for deep research is a popular use case.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)

### Enterprise vs. Developer Needs

  - [**Enterprise:**](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
      - [Focus on automation to trigger actions and run workflows autonomously.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
      - [Goal: Shift from AI-assisted productivity to AI-driven task completion.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**Developer:**](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [Focus on control and composability.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
      - [Needs: API access to all UI features, robust file handling, and the ability to include/exclude websites from searches.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)

### Market Challenges & You.com's Differentiators

  - [**Primary Challenge: Low Brand Awareness**](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=2446.0)
      - [Most prospects are unfamiliar with You.com.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=2446.0)
      - [The story of its founder (Richard) and the You.com URL quickly builds credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=2503.0)
  - [**Competitor Weaknesses (SERP APIs):**](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=2249.0)
      - [**Bing:** Sunset its API, forcing migrations.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=2249.0)
      - [**Google SERP:** Limits results to 10, reducing accuracy by missing relevant data on later pages.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=2249.0)
      - [**Perplexity:** Scrapes data unofficially.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=2360.0)
  - [**You.com's Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=3080.0)
      - [**Security & Privacy:** Zero data retention and no model training on customer data, negotiated for all LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
      - [**Model Access:** Access to all leading LLMs (GPT, Claude, Gemini) on one platform, hedging against the risk of choosing the wrong one.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
      - [**Freshness & Accuracy:** Proprietary web and news indexes provide current data, avoiding factual errors common in models trained on older datasets.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
      - [**Scalability:** Proven enterprise-grade scale (1B+ API calls/mo) is a key decision factor for large clients like Amazon and Alibaba.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=3495.0)
      - [**Extensibility & Support:** A consultative approach ("AI Factory") helps clients build solutions, which differentiates You.com from pure API providers.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=2675.0)

### Product Roadmap & Content Opportunities

  - [**Upcoming Feature: Accuracy/Latency Toggle**](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=3158.0)
      - [A new API parameter will let developers choose between speed and accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=3158.0)
      - [**Content Opportunity:** Position You.com as a thought leader in next-gen search APIs, creating use-case content around this flexibility.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=3315.0)
  - [**Customer Request: Self-Serve Orchestration**](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
      - [Demand for a drag-and-drop UI for multi-agent workflows and system-triggered actions (e.g., update Salesforce → trigger agent).](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [**Content Opportunity: AI Transformation Thought Leadership**](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=3677.0)
      - [Educate enterprises on the investment and organizational change required for successful AI adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=3677.0)
      - [**Goal:** Help companies plan budgets for AI transformation, preventing projects from failing due to lack of resources.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=3887.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Brooke:**](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=2719.0)
      - [Resolve internal product naming confusion (E2E vs. AI Factory) to create a unified external message.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=2719.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up with David Lee to get data and nuance on competitive evaluations for content.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=3544.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=3595.0)
      - [Create content tailored to two audiences:](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=3595.0)
          - [**Technical:** Deep dives on API features, evals, and advanced use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=3595.0)
          - [**Enterprise:** Educational content on AI transformation, ROI, and organizational change.](https://fathom.video/share/XuLR2Ezj7YzAySyaGzqTqqxDxg-5DYe5?tab=summary&timestamp=3595.0)
